steps.title: Separate the dependent clause
steps.content: Though it was designated as mission STS-45 is a dependent introductory clause. It cannot stand alone and should be followed by a comma before the main clause.

steps.title: Reject wrong boundaries
steps.content:
• Choice B adds and, which does not correctly connect a though-clause to the main clause.
  • Choice C creates a fragment by ending the dependent clause with a period.
  • Choice D omits the needed comma after the dependent clause.

steps.title: Use the comma boundary
steps.content: A comma after STS-45 correctly separates the introductory though-clause from the main clause the mission was actually the forty-sixth flight. The answer is A.
